serviceNotes.engine oil: OM612 2.7L five-cylinder CDI: fixed EU plans commonly 15,000 km or 12 months; rec 10,000 km severe use.
serviceNotes.dust filter: Dust filter per Mercedes EU booklet.
serviceNotes.engine air filter: Updated to 30,000 km using W210 CDI Tier 2 schedule https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service (OM611 proxy; no dedicated OM612 page on auto-abc).
serviceNotes.coolant: Updated to 90,000 km / 5 years using W210 CDI Tier 2 schedule https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service (OM611 proxy).

serviceSources.engine oil: File: 15,000 km / 12 months. Tier 2 https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service (OM611 E 220 CDI proxy) lists 10,000 km / 12 months. Kept 15,000 km / 12 months as Mercedes-Benz W210 EU fixed Oil Service / FSS typical for OM612; follow ASSYST/FSS display when equipped.
serviceSources.dust filter: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W210/S210) owner's manual EU — dust/pollen filter 30,000 km / 24 months
serviceSources.engine air filter: Changed from 60,000 km / 48 months to 30,000 km per W210 CDI Tier 2 table https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service (OM611 proxy; OM612-specific auto-abc page unavailable)
serviceSources.brake fluid: Mercedes-Benz E-Class (W210) owner's manual EU — brake fluid renewal every 2 years (DOT 4+)
serviceSources.check brake pad thickness: Mercedes-Benz W210 EU maintenance booklet — inspect brake lining thickness at regular service intervals (~30,000 km orientation)
serviceSources.fuel filter: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service — diesel fuel filter 60,000 km (OM611 family proxy for W210 CDI)
serviceSources.coolant: Changed from 160,000 km to 90,000 km / 60 months per https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service (W210 CDI proxy)
serviceSources.automatic transmission fluid: 722.6 preventive ATF ~60,000 km — Mercedes-Benz workshop / specialist consensus (722.6 marketed as fill-for-life)
serviceSources.manual transmission oil: Manual gearbox oil preventive ~100,000 km — specialist consensus
serviceSources.coolant flush: Supplementary coolant exchange ~120,000 km — specialist preventive (OEM table primary: see coolant MFR)
serviceSources.poly-V belt: https://www.auto-abc.eu/Mercedes-E-klase/v7646-2002/service — serpentine / accessory belt 100,000 km (W210 CDI proxy)
